steps.title: Account for the first two classes
steps.content: The first class is free, and the second class is half of $\$26.40$, which is $\$13.20$. For $x>2$, the remaining $x-2$ classes cost $\$26.40$ each.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content: The total cost is the fixed $\$13.20$ for the first two classes plus $\$26.40$ for each remaining class: $$f(x)=26.40(x-2)+13.20$$
